KillSearchIndexer.Description: SearchIndexer + SearchHost + SearchApp. Causes disk I/O spikes during gaming. WSearch service is already disabled but the process may still be in memory.

KillWinUpdate.Description: TiWorker + MoUsoCoreWorker + WaasMedicAgent + UsoClient. Causes CPU and disk spikes during gaming. Does NOT permanently disable Windows Update.

KillCompatTelemetry.Description: CompatTelRunner — collects app compatibility data periodically. Causes CPU spikes every few hours. Major smoothness killer on long gaming sessions.

KillPhoneLink.Description: PhoneExperienceHost + YourPhone. Continuous sync with smartphone. Uses CPU, RAM and network in background.

KillEdgeWebView.Description: msedgewebview2 — Chromium runtime used by Widgets, Teams, OneDrive and other apps. Can consume 100-300MB RAM unnecessarily.

KillRuntimeBroker.Description: RuntimeBroker — UWP app permission manager. Multiple background instances. Safe to kill for gaming sessions: UWP apps do not crash.

KillLogitech.Description: Logitech LGHUB and Options — overlay and updates

KillSecurityTray.Description: SecurityHealthSystray.exe — tray notification icon only. Does NOT disable Defender.

KillWidgets.Description: Widgets.exe — Windows 11 news/weather panel running in background. Frees RAM and CPU.

InputKeyboard.Description: Delay=0 (250ms), Speed=31. kbdclass driver buffer reduced. i8042prt PollStatusIterations=1. Sticky/Filter/Toggle Keys OFF.

InputMouse.Description: Acceleration OFF. Linear 1:1 curve (no Windows smoothing). mouclass + mouhid buffer reduced.

InputUSBHID.Description: Selective Suspend OFF. Power management OFF on all USB devices. IRQ 8 and 12 prioritized. HidUsb configured.

InputUSBCpuDirect.Description: Downloads and launches cpu-direct-usb: maps USB controllers by latency (CHIP 0=CPU-direct best, CHIP 1=via chipset, CHIP 2+=hub). Shows which port to use for mouse/keyboard. Interactive tool in new window.

GamingGameMode.Description: AllowAutoGameMode=1. SystemResponsiveness=0, NetworkThrottlingIndex=OFF. GPU Priority=8, CPU Priority=6. Dedicated scheduling.

GamingGameBarDVR.Description: Removes DirectX hooks from Game DVR. Eliminates overlay and background audio capture. Frees CPU and GPU.

GamingIFEO.Description: CpuPriorityClass=High, IoPriority=High, PagePriority=High via IFEO. Permanent, without Task Manager.

GamingNagle.Description: TcpAckFrequency=1 + TCPNoDelay=1 on all network interfaces. Lower ping, less jitter on FiveM servers.

GamingTimer.Description: bcdedit: disabledynamictick=yes, useplatformclock=true. More stable frame time. Requires reboot.

GamingVisuals.Description: Disables Aero animations, transparency and shadows. Frees GPU/CPU desktop resources for gaming.

GamingMPO.Description: OverlayTestMode=5. Fixes stuttering and frame drops caused by MPO on Nvidia/AMD GPUs.

GamingIPv6Disable.Description: DisabledComponents=255. Disables IPv6 on all interfaces. Reduces DNS/routing overhead.

GamingTeredo.Description: netsh interface teredo set state disabled. Removes the unnecessary IPv6 tunnel.

GamingDateTimeUTC.Description: RealTimeIsUniversal=1. Useful for Linux dual boot to avoid clock skew.

GamingCoreParking.Description: CpuMinCores=100, CpuMaxCores=100. Forces all cores always active. Eliminates wake-up latency of parked cores.

GamingFSO.Description: DISABLEDXMAXIMIZEDWINDOWEDMODE for FiveM.exe and GTA5.exe. Forces exclusive DX fullscreen without DWM hooks. Reduces input lag and stuttering.

GamingScheduledTasks.Description: Disables Windows scheduled tasks that cause periodic CPU/disk spikes: CompatTelRunner, Consolidator, DiskDiagnostic, QueueReporting, ProgramDataUpdater. Immediate effect, no reboot needed.

GamingHPET.Description: Removes useplatformclock. System uses CPU TSC timer instead of HPET: fewer interrupts, more consistent frame time. Alternative to 'Timer Resolution 0.5ms'. Requires reboot.

IntelCStates.Description: intelppm CstateEnabled=0 + IdleDisable powercfg. Eliminates C1/C3/C6/C8 wake-up latency. Increases power at idle. Requires reboot. Intel CPUs only.

IntelPerfBoost.Description: PERFBOOSTMODE=Aggressive, EPP=0 (Max Perf), PROCTHROTTLEMIN=100. Maximum constant CPU frequency. Intel CPUs only — auto-skip on AMD.

AMDCStates.Description: amdppm CstateEnabled=0 + IdleDisable powercfg. Eliminates Ryzen core wake-up latency. Increases power at idle. Requires reboot. AMD Ryzen CPUs only.

AMDPrecisionBoost.Description: PERFBOOSTMODE=Aggressive, EPP=0 (Max Perf), PROCTHROTTLEMIN=100. Maximum constant Ryzen frequency. AMD CPUs only — auto-skip on Intel.

SistemaCPUMemory.Description: Win32PrioritySeparation=26 (favors foreground processes). DisablePagingExecutive=1 (kernel in RAM). LargeSystemCache=0.

SistemaBackgroundApps.Description: GlobalUserDisabled=1. Prevents UWP apps from running in background during gaming.

SistemaPrivacy.Description: Disables Start menu recommendations, ads, web search and unnecessary telemetry. Improves overall performance.

SistemaTelemetria.Description: AllowTelemetry=0. Blocks sending diagnostic data to Microsoft. Disables dmwappushservice.

SistemaActivityHistory.Description: EnableActivityFeed=0, PublishUserActivities=0, UploadUserActivities=0. Prevents Windows from recording user activities.

SistemaConsumerFeatures.Description: DisableWindowsConsumerFeatures=1. Prevents automatic installation of sponsored apps.

SistemaStorageSense.Description: Disables Windows automatic disk space cleanup.

SistemaCopilot.Description: TurnOffWindowsCopilot=1, ShowCopilotButton=0. Removes Copilot from Taskbar and disables the service.

SistemaHibernation.Description: powercfg /h off. Frees disk space by removing hiberfil.sys (size = installed RAM).

SistemaEndTask.Description: TaskbarEndTask=1. Adds End Task option to Taskbar context menu.

SistemaTempFiles.Description: Deletes contents of %TEMP% and C:\Windows\Temp to free disk space.

SistemaPowerThrottle.Description: PowerThrottlingOff=1. Prevents Windows from throttling CPU of background processes. Maintains full responsiveness for FiveM overlays.

SistemaTCPOptimize.Description: MaxUserPort=65534, TcpTimedWaitDelay=30s, Tcp1323Opts=1, DefaultTTL=64. More available ports, faster release of closed connections. Reduces jitter on FiveM servers.

SistemaShutdownSpeed.Description: WaitToKillAppTimeout=2000ms, HungAppTimeout=1000ms, AutoEndTasks=1, WaitToKillServiceTimeout=2000ms. System shutdown up to 10x faster.

SistemaAdvertisingID.Description: Enabled=0, DisabledByGroupPolicy=1, TailoredExperiences=0. Disables unique advertising ID and personalized experiences based on diagnostics.

SistemaFeedback.Description: NumberOfSIUFInPeriod=0, DoNotShowFeedbackNotifications=1. Removes Windows feedback popups and periodic reports to Microsoft.

SistemaWidgetsPolicy.Description: AllowNewsAndInterests=0, ShellFeedsTaskbarViewMode=2. Completely disables the Widgets panel via policy and deactivates related scheduled tasks.

SvcSysMain.Description: App preloading — uses RAM and I/O

SvcPrintSpooler.Description: Windows print service. Disable only if you don't use physical or virtual printers (including PDF).

SvcBluetooth.Description: Bluetooth support service. Disable only if you don't use Bluetooth mice, headsets or other devices.

SvcDiagPolicy.Description: DPS — Windows diagnostics orchestrator. Set to Manual: only starts when needed.

SvcDeliveryOpt.Description: DoSvc — P2P Windows Update sharing with other PCs on the network. High disk/network usage.

SvcCDP.Description: CDPSvc — connected device sync (Timeline, Nearby Sharing).

SvcWInsider.Description: wisvc — Windows Insider Program service. Useless if not enrolled in the Insider program.

SvcEdgeUpdate.Description: edgeupdate + edgeupdatem — automatic Edge background update.

SvcPCA.Description: PcaSvc - checks app compatibility and sends telemetry to Microsoft. No impact on gaming.

SvcBlockWindowsUpdate.Description: Disables wuauserv + UsoSvc + DoSvc + TrustedInstaller (TiWorker root). WaaSMedicSvc=4 via registry (best-effort). Disables WindowsUpdate scheduled task. AU policy NoAutoUpdate=1 + pause until 2038. Eliminates svchost/TiWorker CPU/RAM/disk spikes. UNDO restores everything.

PowerUltimate.Description: Activates Ultimate Performance and forces CPU to 100%. No core parking, no throttling. Requires reboot for full effect.

PowerBackup.Description: Exports original registry keys to Desktop before applying optimizations. Recommended to run this first.

PowerNvidiaProfile.Description: Copies config\profile.nip to Desktop. Settings: VSync=Off, Adaptive Tear Control, Max Pre-Rendered Frames=1, Power=Max Performance, Threaded Opt=On, FXAA=Off, Triple Buffer=Off, Refresh=Highest, FRL Low Latency=On.

PowerNvidiaInstall.Content: Install and Launch NV Inspector + Profile
PowerNvidiaInstall.Description: Downloads nvidiaProfileInspector from GitHub (only if not already present) to tools\nvidiaProfileInspector\, then launches it with your custom profile already loaded. Internet connection required only on first use.

DebloatWidgets.Description: TaskbarDa=0. Removes the Widgets button (news/weather) from the Windows 11 Taskbar.

DebloatOneDrive.Description: Completely removes Microsoft OneDrive from the system. Difficult to reverse.

DebloatMicrosoftOffice.Description: Office Hub, OneNote UWP, Sticky Notes, Whiteboard, Power Automate Desktop. Unnecessary Microsoft productivity packages on a gaming PC. Reinstallable from the Microsoft Store.

DebloatMicrosoftMedia.Description: Photos, 3D Viewer, Sound Recorder, Camera, Alarms. NOTE: removes the built-in photo viewer — install an alternative (IrfanView, XnView, etc.).

DebloatMicrosoftComm.Description: Mail and Calendar, Phone Link, Your Phone, Skype. Removes the built-in email client: use Outlook.com via browser or a third-party client (Thunderbird, etc.).

DebloatMicrosoftSystem.Description: Quick Assist, Cortana UWP, 3D Builder, 3D Print, Feedback Hub, Tips. Unused Microsoft system apps consuming RAM and disk.

DebloatWindowsCapabilities.Description: Windows Media Player legacy, XPS Viewer, Steps Recorder, Math Recognizer, Internet Explorer. Removed via DISM — slower than AppxPackage, wait for completion.

DebloatMicrosoftStore.Description: WARNING: removes the Microsoft Store. Without Store, UWP apps removed by other Debloat tweaks cannot be reinstalled. Run ONLY after all other Debloat tweaks. Practically irreversible without reinstalling Windows.

DebloatXbox.Description: Removes Xbox App, Game Overlay, Identity Provider and Xbox Speech via Remove-AppxPackage.

DebloatUnwantedApps.Description: Removes pre-installed useless apps: Candy Crush, News, Maps, Solitaire, Feedback Hub, Teams, Clipchamp, etc.

DebloatEdge.Description: StartupBoostEnabled=0, BackgroundModeEnabled=0. Prevents Microsoft Edge from starting in background.

PersFileExtensions.Description: HideFileExt=0. Shows file extensions (.exe, .txt, etc.) in File Explorer.

PersHiddenFiles.Description: Hidden=1. Shows files and folders with hidden attribute in File Explorer.

PersTaskbarSearch.Description: SearchboxTaskbarMode=0. Removes the search box from the Taskbar.

PersTaskbarTaskView.Description: ShowTaskViewButton=0. Removes the Task View button (virtual desktops) from the Taskbar.

PersRightClickMenu.Description: Restores the full Windows 10-style context menu on Windows 11 via CLSID {86ca1aa0}.

PersFileExplorerHome.Content: File Explorer: Open on This PC
PersFileExplorerHome.Description: LaunchTo=1. Sets File Explorer to open on This PC instead of Home or Quick Access.

PersFileExplorerGallery.Description: IsPinnedToNameSpaceTree=0. Removes the Gallery entry from the File Explorer side panel.

PersStartMenuRec.Description: Start_IrisRecommendations=0. Removes app and file suggestions from the Windows 11 Start menu.

PersDarkTheme.Description: AppsUseLightTheme=0, SystemUsesLightTheme=0. Enables dark theme for applications and system.

PersNumLock.Description: InitialKeyboardIndicators=2. Automatically activates Num Lock at Windows startup.

KillOverwolf.Description: OverwolfBrowser + OverwolfHelper + OverwolfCrashHandler. Heavy gaming overlay running in background.

KillEAApp.Description: EADesktop + EABackgroundService. EA Games launcher running in background.

KillUbisoft.Description: upc + UplayWebCore. Ubisoft launcher running in background.

KillBattleNet.Description: Battle.Net + BlizzardError. Blizzard launcher running in background.

KillNahimic.Description: NahimicService + Nahimic3UI + NahimicOSD. Audio enhancement that adds latency. Common on ASUS/MSI boards.

KillArmouryCrate.Description: ArmouryCrate + ArmouryCrateSVC. ASUS RGB/overclocking software. Only relevant if you have ASUS hardware.

KillMSICenter.Description: MSI_Center + MSIComb. MSI RGB/overclocking software. Only relevant if you have MSI hardware.

KillWER.Description: WerMgr + WerFault. Generates I/O and CPU usage on application crashes. No impact during normal gaming.

KillCorsairICUE.Description: iCUE.exe. Corsair RGB management — high CPU usage in background. Only relevant if you have Corsair peripherals.

KillSteelSeries.Description: SteelSeriesGG + SteelSeries_GG + SteelSeriesEngine3. SteelSeries peripheral software.

KillTelegram.Description: Telegram.exe. Messaging app running in background.

KillTwitch.Description: Twitch + TwitchUI. Twitch desktop app running in background.

KillTiWorker.Description: TiWorker + MoUsoCoreWorker + UsoClient + WaaSMedicAgent. Also stops TrustedInstaller service to prevent immediate TiWorker respawn. Primary cause of CPU/disk spikes during gaming.

KillPrintSpooler.Description: spoolsv.exe — Windows print queue manager. Completely useless during gaming. Frees RAM and reduces disk I/O.

KillOfficeBackground.Description: OfficeClickToRun + OfficeC2RClient + MSOSYNC. Office update and sync processes running in background. Generates useless I/O and network traffic during gaming.

KillTabletInput.Description: TabTip.exe + TabTip32.exe. Windows touch/pen input panel. Completely useless on a gaming desktop PC. Consumes memory in background.

KillEdgeUpdate.Description: MicrosoftEdgeUpdate.exe. Edge auto-update background process. Generates network connections and disk I/O during gaming.

KillWMIProvider.Description: WmiPrvSE.exe + WMIADAP.exe. WMI provider host. Can cause sudden CPU spikes. WARNING: temporarily breaks hardware monitoring software (HWiNFO64, CPU-Z).

KillSpeechRuntime.Description: SpeechRuntime.exe + SpeechExperienceHost.exe. Windows speech recognition services. Useless on gaming PC without active Cortana voice commands.

StartupVanguard.Description: Sets vgc service to Manual. Vanguard will not start with Windows. Launch Vanguard manually from Start menu before playing Valorant.

StartupSteam.Description: Removes Steam from HKCU\Run registry. Steam will not start automatically at boot. Backup saved for UNDO.

StartupDiscord.Description: Removes Discord (stable) from HKCU\Run registry. Backup saved for UNDO.

StartupDiscordCanary.Description: Removes Discord Canary from HKCU\Run registry. Separate from stable build. Backup saved for UNDO.

StartupSpotify.Description: Removes Spotify from HKCU\Run registry. Backup saved for UNDO.

StartupEpicGames.Description: Removes Epic Games Launcher from HKCU\Run registry. Backup saved for UNDO.

StartupEAApp.Description: Removes EA App or Origin from HKCU\Run registry. Backup saved for UNDO.

StartupUbisoft.Description: Removes Ubisoft Connect (Uplay) from HKCU\Run registry. Backup saved for UNDO.

StartupBattleNet.Description: Removes Battle.net from HKCU\Run registry. Backup saved for UNDO.

StartupOneDrive.Description: Removes OneDrive from HKCU\Run registry. OneDrive will not start with Windows. Backup saved for UNDO.

StartupTeams.Description: Removes Microsoft Teams from HKCU\Run registry. Backup saved for UNDO.

StartupRazer.Description: Removes Razer Synapse from HKCU\Run and HKLM\Run registry. Backup saved for UNDO.

StartupLogitech.Description: Removes Logitech G HUB from HKCU\Run registry. Backup saved for UNDO.

StartupCorsair.Description: Removes Corsair iCUE from HKCU\Run registry. Backup saved for UNDO.

SistemaSvcHostRAM.Description: Sets SvcHostSplitThresholdInKB based on installed RAM. Windows groups multiple services into the same svchost.exe instead of one process per service, reducing total background process count.
